examples: There is a saying that goes, "A soul without a high aim is as a ship without a rudder".
Propulsion is provided by a rocket engine, rather than a propeller and rudder, which makes steering difficult.
"Like that guy in high school with the Camaro and the mustache who bow-hunts on weekends," Rudder said.
Just push the throttle forward, keeping the nose wheel on the centerline with rudder-pedal steering.
Four-man rowing sculls glide past, oarsmen grunting as the coxswain deftly works the rudder.
